targets.rawSql: SELECT exchange, symbol, last(rate) rate, last(next_funding_time) next_funding_time FROM funding_rate WHERE timestamp > dateadd('h', -2, now()) GROUP BY exchange, symbol ORDER BY rate ASC

SELECT timestamp time, symbol, rate FROM funding_rate WHERE exchange = 'binance' AND symbol IN ('BTCUSDT','ETHUSDT','SOLUSDT','XRPUSDT','BNBUSDT','DOGEUSDT') AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY timestamp

panels.title: Most negative funding (short-hedge candidates)
panels.description: Negative funding rate means shorts receive payment. Largest-negative symbols on binance shown first.

targets.rawSql: SELECT exchange, symbol, last(rate) rate, last(next_funding_time) next FROM funding_rate WHERE timestamp > dateadd('h', -2, now()) GROUP BY exchange, symbol ORDER BY rate ASC LIMIT 30

panels.title: Flipster − Binance funding diff (requires flipster feed)
panels.description: Cross-exchange funding arb opportunity. Only populated when FLIPSTER_API_KEY is configured.

targets.rawSql: WITH f AS (SELECT timestamp time, symbol, rate r FROM funding_rate WHERE exchange='flipster' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)), b AS (SELECT timestamp time, symbol, rate r FROM funding_rate WHERE exchange='binance' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)) SELECT f.time, f.symbol, f.r - b.r diff FROM f ASOF JOIN b ON symbol
